message:
fix(parser): recognize WITH and VALUES as valid subquery starters

Parenthesized expressions and IN-clause subquery detection previously
only matched KwSelect, causing CTEs (WITH ... SELECT) and VALUES
clauses to be mis-parsed as row-value or expression lists.  Extend the
peek_kind match arms to include KwWith and KwValues so these constructs
are correctly routed through parse_subquery_minimal.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
